# Emphasis

Italic with underscores: _hello_ world.

Italic with asterisks: *hello* world.

Bold with underscores: __hello__ world.

Bold with asterisks: **hello** world.

Bold-italic underscores: ___hello___ world.

Bold-italic asterisks: ***hello*** world.

Mid-word underscore (should not be emphasis): foo_bar_baz.

Mid-word asterisk (is emphasis per CommonMark): foo*bar*baz.

Strikethrough (GFM): ~~deleted~~ kept.
